name: bria-obs-backgroundremoval
description: Real-time AI background removal powered by Bria V-RMBG 3.0.
long_description:
## Bria Background Removal for OBS

Remove your video background in real time using Bria's V-RMBG 3.0 model. Your webcam frames are streamed to Bria's cloud inference endpoint and returned background-removed directly into your OBS scene.

Built on Bria's commercially licensed AI models, making it safe for any stream, broadcast, or commercial production.

**Key features**
- Real-time background removal — live video processed frame-by-frame
- Non-binary alpha edges — soft, natural cutouts; hair and fine details preserved
- Native OBS filter — integrates as a standard Effect Filter on any camera source
- One-time sign-in — authenticate once with your Bria account; stays signed in

**Requirements**
- OBS Studio 31.0 or later
- A free Bria account (create one at https://platform.bria.ai)
- Windows 10/11 (x64) or macOS 12+ (arm64 / x86_64)
- Internet connection (frames processed in Bria's cloud)

**Getting started**
1. Add a Video Capture Device source in OBS for your webcam.
2. Right-click the source → Filters → click + → choose "Bria – Remove Background".
3. In the filter panel, click "Sign in with Bria" and complete login in your browser.
4. Your background is removed. Done.

Report issues at https://github.com/Bria-AI/obs-backgroundremoval/issues
